# Figure description: 47.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Геофизические_разрезы/47.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **quantitative geophysical interpretation figure** showing results of **gravity anomaly (Δg) curve-fitting / forward modelling** along two interpreted profiles. It combines:
- Upper panels: observed and modelled gravity (Δg) curves plotted against horizontal distance
- Lower panels: corresponding **geological-geophysical cross-sections** (density models) showing interpreted subsurface structure with assigned density contrast values

This is a classic Soviet-era **interpretational profile** (интерпретационный профиль) used in gravity survey quantitative interpretation.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The figure covers **two interpretation profiles**:
- **Left panel: Профиль XII (Profile XII)**
- **Right panel: Профиль XIV (Profile XIV)**

Both profiles are at **1:200,000 scale** (Масштаб 1:200,000), consistent with the regional survey covering map sheets M-42 and N-42.

The horizontal axes show distances in kilometres (ranging approximately from ~0 to 500–600 km equivalent units, likely hectometres or profile kilometres). The vertical axes of the upper panels show **Δg values in мГл (milligals)**, ranging from approximately **-500 to +800 мГл** (likely in units of 0.1 mGal = 10⁻¹ mGal, i.e., the values shown may be in units of 10⁻⁵ m/s²).

The lower panels show **depth cross-sections** extending to approximately **-4 to -6 km depth**, with labelled geological units/bodies.

---

## Key Content

### Upper Panels (Gravity Curves):
Each profile shows **two curves**:
1. A **smooth observed Δg curve** (графики Δg в г/мм — gravity graph in g/mm, i.e., observed field)
2. A **dashed modelled/calculated Δg curve** (графики Δg в мГл — calculated curve)

**Profile XII:**
- Shows a prominent **broad positive anomaly** in the left-central portion reaching ~+800 units, labelled with point **"а2"** (a fitted anomaly source point)
- A **negative anomaly trough** reaching approximately **-400 to -500 units** in the right portion
- Then a secondary **positive** feature to the right (~+600 units), labelled **"а5"**
- Multiple circled points (⊙) mark **"точки подбора кривой Δg"** — fit-control points using Talwani or equivalent method

**Profile XIV:**
- Similar morphology: a **large positive anomaly** on the left (~+700–800 units), labelled **"а5"**
- A **negative trough** (~-400 units) in the centre-right
- A secondary **positive peak** on the right labelled **"а2"**
- The fit between observed and calculated curves appears generally good, validating the density model

### Lower Panels (Density Cross-Sections):
Each cross-section shows interpreted geological bodies as **ruled/hatched blocks** at various depths, with assigned **density contrast values (σ in г/см³)**:
- Bodies labelled with formation names including: **PR₁** (Lower Proterozoic), **PR₂B** (Middle Proterozoic), **O** (Ordovician), **D** (Devonian), **C** (Carboniferous), and possibly **Рифей (Riphean)** units
- Density contrast values are annotated on the blocks (e.g., **+0.05 г/см³**, **-0.03 г/см³**, **+0.033 г/см³**, **-0.004 г/см³**)
- The **Казахстанский (Kazakhstan) crystalline basement** surface is shown with a **hatched/ruled pattern** — indicating the top of the Precambrian basement as interpreted from geophysical data
- **Geological faults** (геологические разломы) are shown as diagonal-ruled symbols

The cross-sections reveal:
- **Deep basement topography** with relief of several kilometres
- Alternating **dense and less-dense bodies** correlating with gravity highs and lows
- Interpreted **graben-horst structure** of the Precambrian basement

## Text and Labels

**Title (top centre):**
> РЕЗУЛЬТАТЫ КОЛИЧЕСТВЕННОЙ ИНТЕРПРЕТАЦИИ ГРАФИКОВ ΔG
> ПО ИНТЕРПРЕТАЦИОННЫМ ПРОФИЛЯМ
> МАСШТАБ 1:200 000

**Profile labels:**
- Профиль XII (left)
- Профиль XIV (right)

**Axis labels:**
- Vertical (upper panels): **Δg [мГл]** with numerical scale markings at approximately 100-unit intervals
- Vertical (lower panels): **h [км]** (depth in kilometres), scale from 0 to approximately -4 to -6 km
- Horizontal: distance in km with tick marks at intervals of ~100 units

**Legend (Условные обозначения — bottom of figure):**

*Graphical symbols:*
- **Графики Δg в г/мм** — observed gravity curves (solid line)
- **Графики Δg в мГл** — calculated gravity curves (dashed line)
- **Точки подбора кривой Δg по палеткам Талвани К.М.** — fit-control points using Talwani K.M. nomograms (circled dots ⊙)
- **Разломы казахстанского фундамента по геофизическим данным** — faults of the Kazakhstan basement from geophysical data (hatched symbol)
- **Геологические разломы** — geological faults (diagonal-rule symbol)

*Density values listed in legend (right side — partially legible):*

- **-0.02 г/см³** — бид. Д (δср.взв. = 2.61 г/см³)
- **-0.04 г/см
